cases.name: audit_human_only_cli
cases.prompt: Audit this CLI for agent ergonomics. It has `tool list` with table output only, prose errors, and interactive delete confirmation.

must_not_include: scrape the table as the preferred solution

cases.name: design_agent_contract
cases.prompt: Design the machine contract for a CLI with list, get, create, and delete commands that agents will call in CI.

must_not_include: interactive prompts as the only path

cases.name: score_existing_cli
cases.prompt: Score this CLI: `list --json` works, errors are prose only, there is no schema command, delete has --dry-run, and logs are mixed into stdout.

cases.name: context_efficiency
cases.prompt: Our CLI returns 20,000 JSON records by default. Improve it for agents.
